Quiet for several years, revived by 4-1BB×5T4 bispecific (ALG.APV-527, Alligator/Aptevo) and a new wave of academic CAR-T programs (UCL, Cancer Research UK). Tests the tracker on a thin clinical landscape with academic-heavy preclinical momentum — exactly where preprints + NIH grants matter most.
